model_definition.bootstrap_term: Set to zero to isolate the immediate terminal-mass estimator; this is the variance source being tested in experiment 0001.
model_definition.one_state_setup: Every row represents repeated draws from one normalized-reward state-action transition with fixed r_bar in [0, 1].

sampled_augmented_terminal_model.sampled_g_plus_target: 1 if sampled augmented next state is g_plus else 0
